主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Skill instructs users to download and execute a remote script via curl-to-bash without verification, creating supply chain attack risk

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Direct instruction: 'curl -sSL https://canifi.com/skills/healthgrades/install.sh | bash' - classic supply chain attack pattern

主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Skill claims capabilities (search doctors, read reviews, check credentials) but no implementation files are present to support these claims

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Network endpoints defined but no implementation shown for advertised capabilities

主要发现 (top_findings).摘要 (summary): Examples show credential storage in environment variables without security context, potentially normalizing unsafe practices

证据位置 (evidence_spans).说明 (why): Example: 'canifi-env set HEALTHGRADES_EMAIL "your-email@example.com"' and password storage

遗漏项 (missed_items).原因 (why): Critical to examine the downloaded script for actual behavior - needed to assess maliciousness of download-execute pattern
Need to see actual implementation files for advertised capabilities (search, reviews, credentials)
